response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of software engineering experience and a strong craftsmanship mindset, but the role is specifically a Senior C++ developer position requiring deep C++/STL, multi-threading, industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443), and MQTT/message-broker expertise. The resume shows only ~6 months of C/C++ work at National Instruments back in 2014–2015; the bulk of recent experience is TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. No evidence of SDL/IEC 62443, industrial automation protocols, or MQTT/message-broker architectures.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Broad polyglot experience including low-latency systems (DLang at Sociomantic)
Mentorship and teaching track record (workshops, dojos, Selenium course)
concerns: Minimal and dated C++ experience (~6 months in 2014–2015)
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity
No exposure to industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) or MQTT/message brokers

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering rigor and TDD practice
